fileContext.overview: CodeAtlasStatusBar class that displays the CodeAtlas status bar item in the VS Code status bar.

symbols.name: CodeAtlasStatusBar
symbols.purpose: Display the CodeAtlas status bar item.
symbols.behavior: Creates a status bar item and updates its text and tooltip based on the CodeAtlas workflow status.
symbols.limitations: Requires VS Code and may throw errors if VS Code is not available.
